role: Provides concrete LLM transport implementations and testing utilities for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Implements multiple LLM providers (Gemini, OpenAI, and mock) with a consistent interface, enabling dynamic selection and testing of AI-driven architectural evaluation and prompt validation.

children.role: Infrastructure LLM transport provider implementing the LLMTransport interface for Google Gemini models. A thin API caller that wraps the @google/generative-ai SDK.

Mock LLM client for testing and prompt validation. Implements the LLMClient interface to simulate LLM responses, and includes built-in logic to detect rule violations (e.g., infra facade import violations) in evaluation prompts.
LLM transport provider for OpenAI-compatible APIs. Implements the LLMTransport interface to make chat completion requests through the OpenAI SDK.
